title: Strategy Decision Schema
description: Schema for typed StrategyDecision outputs returned by get_strategy_decision(...) in canonical-architecture.md Sections 3.2, 9.3, and 11, and consumed by IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 4. Open questions: canonical-architecture.md has not yet fully specified payload fields for collect_context, launch_app, stop_app, run_ui_suite, rollback_to_checkpoint, or record_decision, so this schema stays minimal and only types field names that are explicitly present in the docs and examples.

action.description: Typed domain action selected by the strategy layer, from canonical-architecture.md Section 9.3 "Typed Action Graph".

description.description: Builder task description. IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md uses request_builder_task with a description during manual strategy mode and automated BUILD routing.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the decision. This field is shown in the checkpoint_candidate example in canonical-architecture.md.

name.description: Contract-defined command name for run_contract_command, as shown in canonical-architecture.md Section 3.2 examples.

scope.description: Execution scope string for run_contract_command. The examples use targeted scope in canonical-architecture.md and PROMPTS.md.

fingerprint.description: Failure fingerprint identifier for record_failure_signature, from canonical-architecture.md Section 3.2 examples.

run_state.description: Supervisor-level run_state proposed through propose_terminal_state, aligned to canonical-architecture.md Section 9.1 "Terminal States and Readiness Verdict".

evidence_refs.description: Artifact references that support a recorded failure signature, from canonical-architecture.md Section 3.2 examples.

examples.description: Implement the current milestone, then run the targeted verification commands named in the run contract.

examples.reason: The same failure fingerprint exceeded the retry threshold.
